If a cover tile (region 11, 12, or 13) is located between the attacker and defender, bonus modifiers are applied: Region 11 (def –10%, eva +5%, attacker hit –10%), Region 12 (def –15%, eva +7%, attacker hit –15%), Region 13 (def –20%, eva +10%, attacker hit –20%). Also prevents movement endpoints on cover tiles.
